name: f1-intent-chronological-not-lexical
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'F1: intent supersession resolves by chronological instant, not lexical string, across mixed offsets' case (docs/plans/2026-07-22-pr18-correctness-fixes-plan.md F1). recA (2026-07-22T14:18:03-04:00 == 18:18:03Z) is the chronologically later hold and must WIN, superseding recB (2026-07-22T16:39:57Z, chronologically earlier) despite recB's string sorting lexically later. A lexical-descending sort would let a withdrawn hold win. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
